title: LIKE join: BATfetchjoin does not hit always
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, description) VALUES (1, 'example', 'This is an example entry');
INSERT INTO test_table (id, name, description) VALUES (2, 'sample', NULL);
CREATE TABLE join_table (join_id INTEGER, join_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
SELECT * FROM test_table JOIN join_table ON test_table.name LIKE join_table.join_name;
key_bug_features: LIKE join with variable does not always return results
